All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
BetweenPredicate
Immutable predicate for BETWEEN clauses.
DynamicQuery<T>
Represents a fully built query that can be executed.
DynamicQueryBuilder<T>
Immutable, thread-safe implementation of QueryBuilder interface.
DynamicQueryException
Base exception for all dynamic query builder errors.
DynamicQueryImpl<T>
Immutable implementation of DynamicQuery.
FieldValidator
Utility class for validating field names and parameter names in predicates.
InPredicate
Immutable predicate for IN clauses.
LikePredicate
Immutable predicate for LIKE clauses.
LogicalPredicate
Immutable predicate for logical operations (AND, OR, NOT).
NullPredicate
Immutable predicate for NULL checks.
OperatorValidator
Utility class for validating SQL operators in predicates.
Page<T>
Interface representing a paginated result set.
PageImpl<T>
Immutable implementation of Page interface using Java 17 record.
Predicate
Represents a query predicate that can be serialized to SQL.
QueryBuilder<T>
Core interface for dynamic query building with fluent API design.
QueryBuildException
Exception thrown when a query building operation fails due to invalid input, unsupported syntax, or validation problems.
QueryExecutionException
Exception thrown when a query execution fails unexpectedly.
QueryStats
Holds execution metadata for queries.
QueryStatsImpl
Basic implementation of QueryStats interface.
SimplePredicate
Immutable predicate for simple field comparisons.
